# KDP Upload Lane

Use this reference after the manuscript is text-locked and the review DOCX is clean.

## Pre-Upload Gate

Confirm:
- final title and subtitle
- author name
- final review DOCX path
- cover asset path
- trim target
- launch territory and rights
- categories and keywords
- pricing plan
- description / listing copy

Do not start browser upload work while prose is still moving.

## Local Final Checks

1. Rebuild the manuscript from Markdown.
2. Open the rebuilt DOCX in LibreOffice.
3. Check:
- title page
- TOC
- heading consistency
- scene breaks
- front matter
- page count sanity
- obvious art/layout breakage

## Upload Posture

- Treat KDP upload as a manual confirmation lane.
- If automation is requested later, keep it behind explicit user approval.
- Keep a note of exactly which file was uploaded and when.
- If current KDP rules, trim specs, or metadata fields are in question, verify them from official KDP documentation before answering.

## Return Format

When closing an upload-prep run, report:
- artifact path
- last rebuild status
- review status
- metadata readiness
- whether the run stopped at staging or proceeded to upload
